predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dfo.occupation_description, 
    AVG(fdp.years_since_death) AS average_years_since_death, 
    COUNT(fdp.person_id) AS total_person_count
FROM 
    fact_deceased_person_details fdp
JOIN 
    fact_deceased_occupation fdo ON fdp.deceased_id = fdo.deceased_id

    dfo.occupation_description,

    COUNT(fdp.person_id) AS total_person_count

    fact_deceased_occupation fdo ON fdp.deceased_id = fdo.deceased_id

    dim_occupation_codes dfo ON fdo.occupation_id = dfo.occupation_id

    fdp.marital_status_at_death_code = 'Married'
GROUP BY 
    dfo.occupation_description
HAVING 
    COUNT(fdp.person_id) > 0
ORDER BY 
    average_years_since_death DESC;

question: Har ek occupation code ke saath unka average number of years since death aur total count of deceased individuals dikhao, lekin sirf unhi occupation codes ko include karna jinke paas ek se zyada deceased person ho, aur results ko average years since death ke descending order mein sort karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.OCCUPATION_CODE, AVG(T2.YEARS_SINCE_DEATH), COUNT(T2.DECEASED_ID) FROM DIM_OCCUPATION_CODES AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_DECEASED_OCCUPATION AS T3 ON T1.OCCUPATION_ID = T3.OCCUPATION_ID INNER JOIN FACT_DECEASED_PERSON_DETAILS AS T2 ON T3.DECEASED_ID = T2.DECEASED_ID GROUP BY T1.OCCUPATION_CODE HAVING COUNT(T2.DECEASED_ID) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.YEARS_SINCE_DEATH) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dim_occupation_codes.occupation_code, 
    AVG(fact_deceased_person_details.years_since_death) AS average_years_since_death, 
    COUNT(fact_deceased_person_details.deceased_id) AS total_deceased_count
FROM 
    fact_deceased_person_details
JOIN 
    fact_deceased_occupation ON fact_deceased_person_details.deceased_id = fact_deceased_occupation.deceased_id
JOIN 
    dim_occupation_codes ON fact_deceased_occupation.occupation_id = dim_occupation_codes.occupation_id
GROUP BY 
    dim_occupation_codes.occupation_code
HAVING 
    COUNT(fact_deceased_person_details.deceased_id) > 1
ORDER BY 
    average_years_since_death DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dim_occupation_codes.occupation_code, 
    AVG(fact_deceased_person_details.years_since_death) AS average_years_since_death, 
    COUNT(fact_deceased_person_details.deceased_id) AS total_deceased_count
FROM 
    fact_deceased_person_details
JOIN 
    fact_deceased_occupation ON fact_deceased_person_details.deceased_id = fact_deceased_occupation.deceased_id
JOIN 
    dim_occupation_codes ON fact_deceased_occupation.occupation_id = dim_occupation_codes.occupation_id
GROUP BY 
    dim_occupation_codes.occupation_code
HAVING 
    COUNT(fact_deceased_person_details.deceased_id) > 1
ORDER BY 
    average_years_since_death DESC;
